characters.name: Alec Foster
characters.description: Alec Fosteris the husband ofDr. Gillian Fosterand an employee of the US Department of State. Sometime before the first season, Alec and Gillian adopted a baby girl from Delaware called Sophie. Unfortunately, the birth mother took Sophie away from the couple and things were never the same again. They never talk about this because Alec did not want to and finally Gillian told Cal about how she felt in the episodeDo No Harm. He is also a recovering cocaine addict; he was sober for some time before marrying Gilian Foster but doesn't seem to have told her that. He apparently relapsed sometime around the time of Season 1. He repeatedly lies to Gilian about his whereabouts to hide that, claiming to be working late and covering meetings for the State Department when he's actually meeting with his sponsor and attendingCocaine Anonymousmeetings.Dr. Cal Lightman, being protective of Gilian and knowing that Alec is lying, eventually violates his agreeement with Foster to stay out of each other's private lives and follows Alec. Seeing him with another woman, Cal assumes that he's having an affair. (The woman ends up being Alec's sponsor). After Gillian found out about his addiction, they separated and divorced in the episodeSacrifice.

characters.name: Andrew Jenkins
characters.description: Andrew Jenkinsis an American serial rapist whose MO was to abduct women, rape them and then blind them. He was caught, convicted and put in prison around ten years before the events of Season One'sBlindedbut when a copy cat killer starts up, Cal must enter the prison and find out what he knows.

characters.name: Anna
characters.description: Anna(Jennifer Marsala) is an American woman who works at theLightman GroupwithDr. Cal Lightman.

characters.name: Anna
characters.description: Anna(Jennifer Marsala) is an American woman who works at theLightman GroupwithDr. Cal Lightman.

characters.name: Ava Torres
characters.description: Ava Torresis the half sister ofRia Torres. Ava and her sister were pushed around by her father and she did time for assaulting a police officer.  She first appears in "Delinquent" and at the end of the episode, she is accepted into a boarding school.

characters.name: Ben Reynolds
characters.description: Ben Reynoldsis an FBI Agent who, for the most part, resides atThe Lightman Groupto aid in the many criminal cases that Cal and his team handle. He is portrayed byMekhi Phifer. Read more here:www.lietome.com Ben is introduced in the episodeBlinded, and at the end, becomes the FBI's associate at the Lightman Group.

characters.name: Ben Reynolds

characters.name: Clara Musso
characters.description: Clara Mussois a young billionaire widow on the seriesLie to Me. She is portrayed byMelissa George. Clara first appears in the episodeThe Whole Truth. She was accused of killing her husband,Victor Musso, so that she could get his money (an estimated 1.2 billion dollars). However, this was not the case. We see Clara again in the episodeTeacher and Pupils, where she shadows Cal and the rest of the Lightman group on a case, paying him for his time. She also helps the Lightman Group get a loan.

characters.name: Dr. Cal Lightman
characters.description: Emily Lightman(daughter)Zoe Landau(ex-wife) Dr. Cal Lightmanis a fictional clinical psychologist who is an acclaimed "world's leading deception expert", and the main character ofLie to Me. He founded theLightman GroupwithGillian Fosterand says that he can "tell if you're lying, but not why." He is divorced fromZoe Landauand shares custody of their daughterEmily. Born and raised in England, Cal grew up under the care of an alcoholic father and a mother suffering from invisible ailments: mental issues. He also has an older sister, who remains unnamed. Lightman cares greatly for his friend and colleague,Gillian Foster. Lightman and Gillian meet prior to the creation ofThe Lightman Groupwhen Gillian provides therapy sessions for Lightman. They have a strong sense of trust for each other which is displayed throughout the series. There is an obvious chemistry between them, which is more obvious on his side which has led to moments of jealousy. They also have a rule about staying out of each other's personal lives, no matter what they see or hear.

characters.name: Dr. Gillian Foster
characters.description: Little is known canonically about Gillian Foster's personal life. Before the show began, she had married Alec Foster and attempted to adopt a baby with him - a little girl named Sophie. They only made it to day 57, however, before the birth mother changed her mind; she'd been given 60 days to do so. This, amongst other issues like Alec's drug addiction, eventually led to the breakdown of their relationship. They divorced. About her childhood, we know that Gillian's father had an alcohol problem, and then spent her teenage and adult years trying to make it up to her. She excelled in her education, earning a PhD in psychology. She worked for the Pentagon for several years before being hired by Cal Lightman to join his Lightman Group as a business partner. TBA.

characters.name: Dr. Maureen O'Sullivan
characters.description: Dr. Maureen O'Sullivan was a psychology professor at the University of San Francisco who helpedPaul Ekmanin the discovery ofmicroexpressionsand the creation ofThe Paul Ekman Group. They ran together the  Wizard Project. She got her PhD back in the day working with Guilford on the structure of intellect model of intelligence. Her research interests included intelligence, social intelligence, emotional intelligence, evolutionary psychology, deception-detection, and human mating.Maureen O'Sullivan devoted her career to understanding how people understand (or don't) each other's thoughts and feelings. She worked on tests of social intelligence with J.P. Guilford and measures of facial expressions and gestures with Paul Ekman. She also studied cross-cultural differences in romantic love, test construction, and ethnic, gender and age differences in various social-emotional abilities including lie detection. She was a professor of psychology at the University of San Francisco until her death in 2010. On May 10 of 2010, she lost her fight against cancer.

characters.name: Eli Loker
characters.description: Eli Lokeris an employee of The Lightman Group. UnlikeRia Torres, whomLightmancalls "a natural", Loker acquired his skills in "reading" people through academic education and practice. However, he is later promoted to vice president, which puts a rift in any developing relationship between him and Torres. Read more here:www.lietome.com Loker is introduced in thePilot. He adheres toRadical Honesty, and as a result, makes remarks towardRia Torres.

characters.name: Emily Lightman
characters.description: Zoe Landau(Mother) Emily LightmanisCal LightmanandZoe Landau's 16 year old daughter. She occasionally shows an ability to "read" people (with tricks Cal taught her), even her own father. She currently attends high school. Although her relationship with Cal is very close, Emily did show that she doesn't enjoy Cal's overprotection, especially with her boyfriend's choice.  She sometimes drives her father's 1973 BMS 3.0 CS [E9].

characters.name: Farida Mugisha
characters.description: Farida Mugishais a a character who appears inSeason 1'sepisode "Do No Harm" and is portrayed by Christine Adams. She is a renowned peace activist who, at the time of the episode, has written a book where she claims she was kidnapped by rebels as a teenager and witnessed massacres prior to her escape. TheLightman Groupis hired by her publisher who has heard claims that Farida may have taken part in these massacres which the publisher needs to know before publishing the book as it could cause a PR disaster.Ria TorresandEli Lokerare sent to evaluate her claims.

characters.name: James Cole
characters.description: James Coleis a teenage boy who appears in the "pilot episodeofLie to Me. He is a student who is accused of murdering his local high school teacher, Ms. McCartney. He was portrayed by Jake Thomas.

characters.name: Karl Dupree
characters.description: Special Agent Karl Dupree assisted the Lightman group on a case involving a South Korean ambassador. He is romantically involved with Torres. (Season 1 Ep 4 Love Always) He defends Torres against Loker while working on a case. (Season 1 Ep 11 Undercover) Last seen in a comatose state in the hospital with Torres by his side, after been injured in a bombing attack. (Season 1 Ep 13 Sacrifice)

characters.name: Louise Mason
characters.description: Paula Malcomson(in Cal's hallucination inFunhouse) Emily Lightman(granddaughter) Louise Masonis the late mother ofCal Lightmanand the grandmother ofEmily Lightman. She committed suicide at the age of 46, and it is through a tape of her that Cal discoveredmicroexpressions.

characters.name: Louise Mason

characters.name: Manny Trillo
characters.description: Manny Trillois ex-Latino gang leader/cop killer-turned-author who appears in season one's "Unchained" where theLightman Groupinvestigate him. He  was a gang leader who supposely turned away from a life of crime and wrote a book which anti-gang message has him up for a Nobel prize and possible parole. The team investigate wither he is telling the truth and is actually reformed, which could lead him to be released. If he is truly reformed he could work to stop gang activity but if he isn't he could go back to being leader of a violent crime leader.

characters.name: Pied Piper (Serial killer)
characters.description: Pied Piperis the name given to a serial killer who was operating 17 years pier toSeason Two'sepisode "Pied Piper" and who starts killing again after Jason Wilkie, the man convicted for his crimes for the Pied Piper killing, is executed.

characters.name: Ria Torres
characters.description: Ria Torres(often referred to simply as Torres) is aNaturaland former TSA agent who was first introduced in thePilot. Torres was hired byCal Lightmanafter passing his "test" while she was working airport security. Read more here:www.lietome.com

characters.name: Sharon Wallowski
characters.description: DetectiveSharon Wallowskiis a detective working for D.C. police on the tv showLie to Me. She is an on-again, off-again love interest forCal Lightman. Wallowski first appears in the season 2 finale, "Black and White," and becomes a recurring character in the third season.

characters.name: Sharon Wallowski

characters.name: Sheila Lake
characters.description: Sheila Lakeis an American solider who appears in "Moral Waiver" where theLightman Groupinvestigate her claims to have been raped by Staff Sergeant Russell Scott while serving in Afghanistan.

characters.name: Terry Marsh
characters.description: Terry Marshis an longtime friend ofDr. Cal Lightmanwho he has a rocky and distant relationship. It was Terry's family took Lightman in afterhis mothercommitted suicide. One time when he and Terry were on the run from the police as kids, Terry acted as a decoy for Lightman, saying to him, "You're supposed to use that brain of yours for something," and then criticizing himself for his way of life. Terry ended up serving three years in prison. Portrayed by Lennie James.

characters.name: Zeb Weil
characters.description: Zeb Weilis an American man who is a Congressman who appears in the "Pilot episode" where he has been accusations of having paid for sex.

characters.name: Zoe Landau
characters.description: Emily Lightman(daughter) Zoe Landauis a fictional recurring character in the 2009 seriesLie To Me. She is the ex-wife ofDr. Cal Lightman, mother ofEmily Lightmanand fiancee of Roger. Zoe's first appearance was in the episode "The Better Half". She came to Cal and asked for his help in solving an arson case. In this episode it seems that Zoe shows some jealousy towardsGillian, though it is not confirmed. She is an AssistantAttorney Generaland though currently engaged to another man, she also engaged in a tryst with Lightman, after he helped her in a case. It was revealed in "Truth or Consequences" that she is bi-racial, having a white mother and African-American father.
